revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:深淵之水夜礼花神]]
{{Expand French}}{{infobox deity | type = Shinto | cult_centre = | father = {{ill|Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|ja|布波能母遅久奴須奴神|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|qq=}}<ref>{{cite book | last=Herbert | first=J. | title=Shinto: At the Fountainhead of Japan | publisher=Taylor & Francis | series=Routledge Library Editions: Japan | year=2010 | isbn=978-1-136-90376-2 | url=https://books.google.com/books?id=Sg_JBQAAQBAJ&pg=PT402 | access-date=2020-11-21 | page=402}}</ref> | mother = {{ill|Hikawahime|ja|日河比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|fr|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|qq=}}<ref> {{cite book | last=Chamberlain | first=B.H. | title=Kojiki: Records of Ancient Matters | publisher=Tuttle Publishing | series=Tuttle Classics | year=2012 | isbn=978-1-4629-0511-9 | url=https://books.google.com/books?id=jf_PAgAAQBAJ | access-date=2020-11-21 }} </ref> | children = {{ill|Omizunu|en|Omizunu|qid=Q48745416|lt=Omizunu|1=Omizunu}} | spouse = {{ill|Ame-no-Tsudoechine|ja|天之都度閇知泥神|1=Ame-no-Tsudoechine|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|qq=}} | gender = {{ill|male|qid=Q6581097|1=Male (gender)}} | parents ={{ill|Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|qid=Q65266248|1=Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu}}; {{ill|Hikawa-hime|qid=Q65270244|1=Hikawahime}}| consort = {{ill|Ame-no-Tsudoechine|qid=Q55533659|1=Ame-no-Tsudoechine}} | offspring = {{ill|Omizunu|qid=Q48745416|1=Omizunu}} | member_of = {{ill|Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|qid=Q65249569|1=Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities}} }}[[Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana]] (深淵之水夜礼花神) was a Japanese deity associated with [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto]] and the {{ill|Izumo Province|en|Izumo Province|qid=Q582846|lt=Izumo Province|1=Izumo Province}}.<ref name="fountainhead2">{{cite book |last=Herbert |first=J. |url=https://books.google.com/books?id=Sg_JBQAAQBAJ&pg=PT402 |title=Shinto: At the Fountainhead of Japan |publisher=Taylor & Francis |year=2010 |isbn=978-1-136-90376-2 |series=Routledge Library Editions: Japan |page=402 |access-date=2020-11-21}}</ref>{{rp|278}} He was a grandson of [[Yashimajinumi]] and great grandson of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto]] and ancestor of [[Ōkuninushi|Okuninushi]].<ref name="fountainhead2" />{{rp|277-278}}
==Overview==
{{Infobox Japanese deity | name = Fukafuchi-no-Mizuya-Relahana-no-Kami | generation = [[Completion tier 7]] Third generation | predecessor = [[Funabonomochikunusunokami]] | successor = [[Ominunokami]] | classification = [[Kunitsukami]] | full_name = Fukafuchi-no-Mizuya-Relahana-no-Kami (深淵之水夜礼花神) | alternate_names = Fukafuchi-no-Mizuya-Rehana-no-Kami, Fukabuchi-no-Mizuya-Rehana-no-Kami, Fukafuchi-Mizuya-Rehana-Mikoto, Fukabuchi-no-Mizuya-Rehana-Mikoto | epithet = | Rank = | domain = [[Water deity]] | shrine = | father = Funabonomochikunusunokami | mother = [[Hikawabime]] | relatives = | spouse = [[Amatsu-Tsunodopechinokami]] | children = Ominunokami | shrines = {{Plainlist| * Karasaki Shrine * Fukafuchi Shrine * Takigawa Shrine * [[Fuchirokusho Sengen Shrine]] * Minoya Shrine * Ichimita Shrine * Shirafuji Shrine }} | texts = [[Kojiki]] }} '''Fukafuchi-no-Mizuya-Relahana-no-Kami''' (深淵之水夜礼花神／深渕之水夜礼花神, {{smaller|historical kana usage:}} フカフチノミヅヤレハナ／フカブチノミヅヤレハナ) is a deity appearing in [[Japanese mythology]].
== Overview ==
This deity appears exclusively in the *[[Kojiki]]*, with no accounts of deeds beyond the name and genealogy. As one of the [[Completion tier 7]] (*Tōmarinanayo no Kami*), they are classified as a [[Kunitsukami]]. Based on their name and associations with related deities, such as [[:en:Okami|Okami]], Hikawabime, and Ominunokami, Fukafuchi-no-Mizuya-Relahana-no-Kami is considered a deity associated with water, though specific details remain unclear<ref name="#1">Kokugakuin University Kojiki Center - Fukafuchi-no-Mizuya-Relahana-no-Kami</ref>.
The name "深淵" (Fukafuchi) refers to a deep pool of stagnant water, while "夜礼" (*Yare*) can be interpreted as the causative form of "遣る" (*yaru*), conveying the notion of water flowing from the deep pool. Combined with "花" (*hana*, "beginning" or "end"), the name signifies the conceptualization of water's movement and flow as divine<ref>Shinchō Japanese Classics Collection - Kojiki</ref>. Alternatively, some suggest the inclusion of "flower" (*hana*) is a spontaneous association with [[Konohanasakuya-hime]] and lacks deeper meaning<ref name="#1"/>.
== Genealogy ==
Fukafuchi-no-Mizuya-Relahana-no-Kami is the child of Funabonomochikunusunokami and Hikawabime. They married Amatsu-Tsunodopechinokami and gave birth to Ominunokami.
== Shrines Worshipping the Deity ==
* Karasaki Shrine ({{ill|Karasaki Shrine|ja|唐崎神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Karasaki Shrine|qq=}}, {{ill|Nanao, Ishikawa|en|Nanao, Ishikawa|qid=Q695892|lt=Nanao City|1=Nanao, Ishikawa}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Prefecture|en|Ishikawa Prefecture|qid=Q131281|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|1=Ishikawa Prefecture}}) - Principal deity * Fukafuchi Shrine ({{ill|Fukafuchi Shrine|ja|深淵神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukafuchi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504142|1=Fukafuchi Shrine}}, {{ill|Kōnan, Kōchi|en|Kōnan, Kōchi|qid=Q877209|lt=Kōnan City|1=Kōnan, Kōchi}}, {{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|en|Kōchi Prefecture|qid=Q134093|lt=Kōchi Prefecture|1=Kōchi Prefecture}}) - Principal deity * Takigawa Shrine ({{ill|Takigawa Shrine|ja|瀧川神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takigawa Shrine|qid=Q135504145|1=Takigawa Shrine}}, {{ill|Fuji, Shizuoka|en|Fuji, Shizuoka|qid=Q328613|lt=Fuji City|1=Fuji, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|qid=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}) - Enshrined * Fuchirokusho Sengen Shrine ({{ill|Fuji Rokusho Sengen Shrine|ja|富知六所浅間神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuji Rokusho Sengen Shrine|qq=}}, Fuji City, Shizuoka Prefecture) - Shared enshrinement * Minoya Shrine ({{ill|Minoya Shrine|ja|美濃夜神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minoya Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504147|1=Minoya Shrine}}, {{ill|Tsu, Mie|en|Tsu, Mie|qid=Q203027|lt=Tsu City|1=Tsu, Mie}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|en|Mie Prefecture|qid=Q128196|lt=Mie Prefecture|1=Mie Prefecture}}) - Enshrined * Ichimita Shrine ({{ill|Ichimita Shrine|ja|一御田神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichimita Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504151|1=Ichimita Shrine}}, Tsu City, Mie Prefecture) - Enshrined * Shirafuji Shrine ({{ill|Shirafuji Shrine|ja|白藤神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shirafuji Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504153|1=Shirafuji Shrine}}, {{ill|Toyooka, Hyōgo|en|Toyooka, Hyōgo|qid=Q696388|lt=Toyooka City|1=Toyooka, Hyōgo}}, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|qid=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}) - Principal deity
==Family tree== {{Eight generations of Izumo}} ==References== {{reflist}}
== Related Articles ==
* [[Izumo clan]]
== External Links ==
* [https://kojiki.kokugakuin.ac.jp/shinmei/fukafuchinomizuyarehananokami/ Fukafuchi-no-Mizuya-Relahana-no-Kami – Kokugakuin University Classical Culture Project] * [https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j1295/ Karasaki Shrine – Ishikawa Shrine Office] * [https://kotobank.jp/word/%E6%B7%B1%E6%B7%B5%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE-3095225 Fukafuchi Shrine (Kotobank)] * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4404150 Takigawa Shrine – Shizuoka Shrine Office] * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4404103 Fuchirokusho Sengen Shrine – Shizuoka Shrine Office] * [http://kyoka.mie-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/%e7%be%8e%e6%bf%83%e5%a4%9c%e7%a5%9e%e7%a4%be/ Minoya Shrine – Mie Shrine Education Committee] * [http://kyoka.mie-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/%e4%b8%80%e5%be%a1%e7%94%b0%e7%a5%9e%e7%a4%be/ Ichimita Shrine – Mie Shrine Education Committee] * [https://www.hyogo-jinjacho.com/data/6322064.html Shirafuji Shrine – Hyōgo Shrine Office Search]

If I get anywhere near implementing it, I will do so based on the actual completion tiers of this wiki rather than whether I added them when they were on simple english wikipedia or wherever--><!--Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana--> <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> {{wikidata link|Q65272471}} [[Category:Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities]] [[Category:Izumo Province]] [[Category:Japanese deities]] [[Category:Japanese gods]] [[Category:Kunitsukami]] [[Category:Pages linked to by wikidata]] [[Category:Shinto kami]] [[Category:Water deities]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
